totalFishCaught.description: The total number of fish caught by the player.

totalMoneyMade.description: The total amount of money made by the player.

hoursSpentFishing.description: The total number of hours spent fishing by the player.

moneyMadeFromInterest.description: The total amount of money made from interest by the player.

timesGottenDrunk.description: The total number of times the player has gotten drunk.

moneyLostFromGambling.description: The total amount of money lost from gambling by the player.

moneyLostWhileDrunk.description: The total amount of money lost while drunk by the player.

earnedMilestones.description: Names of milestones the player has already been awarded.

totalWorkersHired.description: The lifetime number of workers hired for the fishing business.

totalFishCaughtByCrew.description: The lifetime number of fish caught by the fishing business' crew.

totalWagesPaid.description: The lifetime total of wages paid to the fishing business' crew.

daysInBusiness.description: The number of days the fishing business has produced a catch.

totalRentalIncome.description: The lifetime total of passive rental income earned from investment properties.

highestHomeTier.description: The highest rung on the housing ladder the player has reached (0 = Homeless).

totalPropertiesBought.description: The lifetime number of investment properties bought.

totalRentPaid.description: The lifetime total of rent paid for a rented room.
